closeOnEscape.description: Whether to close the tour when the escape key is pressed.

closeOnInteractOutside.description: Whether to close the tour when the user clicks outside the tour.

focusOutside.description: Emits details when focus moves outside the tour content.

id.description: The unique identifier of the tour.

ids.type:
Partial<{
  content: string
  title: string
  description: string
  positioner: string
  backdrop: string
  arrow: string
}>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the tour. Useful for composition.

interactOutside.description: Emits details when an interaction happens outside the tour content.

keyboardNavigation.description: Whether left/right arrow keys navigate between steps.

pointerDownOutside.description: Emits details when the pointer is pressed outside the tour content.

preventInteraction.description: Whether interaction with the rest of the page is prevented while the tour is open.

spotlightOffset.description: The offsets to apply to the spotlight.

spotlightRadius.description: The radius of the spotlight clip path.

statusChange.description: Emits when the tour status changes, including completion and skips.

stepChange.description: Emits details when the highlighted step changes.

stepId.description: The controlled id of the currently highlighted step.

stepsChange.description: Emits details when the step list changes.

action.description: The step action this trigger performs.
